title: TNREGINET 2025: Apply Online for EC, Guideline Value in Tamil Nadu
intro: TNREGINET is a one-stop online portal launched by the Tamil Nadu Registration Department to help citizens access guideline values, apply for encumbrance certificates, register documents, and track registration services online.

sections.content: TNREGINET simplifies property-related registrations and documentation by allowing citizens to apply for services online without repeatedly visiting sub-registrar offices.
What is TNREGINET (Tamil Nadu Registration Department)?

TNREGINET, also known as the Inspector General of Registration (IGRS) portal, is an online platform introduced by the Government of Tamil Nadu to streamline registration of land, marriage, birth, death, firms, chit funds, and companies.
The portal allows users to check guideline values, apply for Encumbrance Certificates (EC), calculate stamp duty, and track application status online.
Advantages of TNREGINET

items: Access services from home without visiting SRO
Promotes digitalisation using biometric and verification tools
Online appointment scheduling with sub-registrar offices
Easy application tracking and SMS alerts

sections.content: What is Guideline Value in Tamil Nadu?
Guideline value is the estimated minimum market value of land or property fixed by the Tamil Nadu government for registration purposes. It may differ from actual market prices.
For developed residential areas, guideline values are fixed street-wise, while undeveloped lands are assessed based on survey numbers.
Importance of TNREGINET Guideline Value

items: Ensures property is not registered below minimum value
Helps detect undervaluation and prevent revenue loss
Assures minimum sale value to property sellers

sections.content: How to Calculate Guideline Value Online in Tamil Nadu

items: Enter property details and click Search
View guideline value street-wise or survey-wise

sections.content: TNREGINET guideline value PDFs can be downloaded directly from the portal.

sections.content: Limitations of TNREGINET Portal

items: Guideline value may differ from market price
Website may be slow during peak hours
New layouts may not be updated immediately
Errors possible due to incorrect survey details

sections.content: TNREGINET Contact Details
Helpline: 044-24640160 | Email: helpdesk@tnreginet.net | Service hours: Weekdays 8 AM–8 PM, Saturdays 10 AM–5 PM

TNREGINET has simplified registration and documentation services in Tamil Nadu by enabling online access to guideline values, EC applications, document registration, and status tracking with improved transparency and efficiency.
